title: CFTC forms new innovation task force to shape crypto, artificial intelligence and prediction markets
message_html: CFTC forms new innovation task force to shape crypto, artificial intelligence and prediction markets ...
snippet: The CFTC launched a new task force focused on cryptocurrencies, artificial intelligence, and the rapidly emerging area of prediction markets.

title: Silo V3 launches new liquidation mechanism opening door to new forms of crypto collateral
message_html: Silo V3 launches new liquidation mechanism opening door to new forms of crypto collateral ...
snippet: Silo V3, unveiled Tuesday, adds a protocol-level insolvency protection mechanism to reduce the dependency on DEX liquidity.

title: Tether Says It Will Be Audited By Big Four Accounting Firm—But Won't Say Which One
message_html: Tether Says It Will Be Audited By Big Four Accounting Firm—But Won't Say Which One ...
snippet: The first independent audit of Tether’s claimed $192 billion stablecoin reserves could pave the way to USDT’s approval under the GENIUS Act.

title: .@Kodeus has integrated Allora inference as a core capability in their agent launch platform. Builders deploying agents on Kodeus access Allora's predictive ...

snippet: Allora (@AlloraNetwork): .@Kodeus has integrated Allora inference as a core capability in their agent launch platform. Builders deploying agents on Kodeus access Allora's predictive price feeds natively at the point of deployment. No separate data infrastructure required.
